creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
Created attachment 202444
doxygen-1.8.15.patch

* Update to 1.8.15
* Update distinfo
* Fix MASTER_SITES
* Appease portlint by adding an extra line after USES

Changelog: http://www.doxygen.nl/manual/changelog.html#log_1_8_15

Tested in poudriere for 11-i386, 11-amd64, 12-i386 and 12-amd64. Passes portlint (although complains about DEPRECATED appearing too late, can't do much about that until Qt4 is removed from the ports tree).

MAY require an exp-run, as I know a lot of ports depend on doxygen and may be affected by this update.
